goal: Rework battleV2 card-type interaction so the five canonical types (立论/策术/玄章/门客/反诘) each provide meaningful and numerically distinct combat value during matches.
constraints: Preserve the current battle loop structure (ming_bian -> an_mou -> reveal -> resolve) and keep UI flow stable.
Do not modify story system, menu system, community module, or unrelated gameplay modules.
Keep changes focused on battleV2 runtime card typing, effect application, and AI planning heuristics.
Ensure numeric interactions are interpretable: each type must have a clear combat role and non-trivial counterplay impact.
deliverables: battleV2 supports all five canonical card types in runtime data and type definitions.
Resolve logic distinguishes five types with meaningful numeric impact (offense, sustain, board presence, control/counter).
AI auto plan prefers type choices based on board state instead of pure random selection.
Verification notes for typecheck/test and expected in-battle behavior changes.
